top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School

top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday for June 2026
top_signals.summary: Microsoft today released software updates to plug nearly 200 security holes across its Windows operating systems and supported software, a record number of fixes for the company's monthly Patch Tuesday cycle. Nearly three dozen of those bugs earned Microsoft's most dire "critical" rating, and exploit code for at least three of the weaknesses is now publicly available.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US and Europe discuss access to AI models after Anthropic dispute
top_signals.summary: ‘Trusted partner’ scheme would allow US allies to test cutting-edge models
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Estonia to quarantine emails sent from Russian .ru domain before they reach government officials
top_signals.summary: Estonia will require additional security screening for emails sent from Russia’s .ru top-level domain before they reach government officials, according to the country's minister of justice and digital affairs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
